You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/networking-console-plugin/source/src/views/networkpolicies/list/NetworkPolicyList.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 25
Rule [family:EmptyState]:
## EmptyState Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <EmptyState headerClassName={...} headingLevel={...} icon={...} isFullHeight={...} status={...} titleClassName={...} titleText={...} variant={...}>
    <EmptyStateBody />
    <EmptyStateFooter />
    <EmptyStateActions />
  </EmptyState>
```

Props that stay on <EmptyState>: headerClassName, headingLevel, icon, isFullHeight, status, titleClassName, titleText, variant

Add imports: EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateFooter, EmptyStateActions from '@patternfly/react-core'

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:
  className -> headerClassName (renamed, type unchanged)
  children -> status (TYPE CHANGED):
    old: React.ReactNode
    new: 'danger' | 'warning' | 'success' | 'info' | 'custom'
New props on replacement:
  isFullHeight: boolean
  variant: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 25: [sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]
    componentName: EmptyStateHeader
    parentName: EmptyState
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: LlmAssisted
      Component: EmptyState
      Replacement: EmptyStateBody

Code contexts:
  (line 25):
   24  
   25  import NetworkPolicyEmptyState from './components/NetworkPolicyEmptyState';
   26  import NetworkPolicyRow from './components/NetworkPolicyRow';



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 2
Line: 29
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  parentName: EmptyStateActions

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   28  
   29  import '@styles/list-management-group.scss';
   30  

```

### Fix 3
Line: 25
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Incident context:
  componentName: EmptyState
  parentFrom: @openshift-console/dynamic-plugin-sdk
  parentName: VirtualizedTable

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: EmptyState
Prop: titleText
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
   24  
   25  import NetworkPolicyEmptyState from './components/NetworkPolicyEmptyState';
   26  import NetworkPolicyRow from './components/NetworkPolicyRow';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/networking-console-plugin/source/src/views/networkpolicies/list/NetworkPolicyList.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.
Now let me check the referenced companion component to understand what `NetworkPolicyEmptyState` looks like:

Now I have a clear picture. Let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 25 - EmptyState family migration, `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`)
The rule references `EmptyStateHeader` as a deprecated component in the EmptyState family. Looking at `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx`, it imports `EmptyStateHeader` from `@patternfly/react-core` and uses it. The fix targets line 25 of `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` which just imports `NetworkPolicyEmptyState`. 

But the fix is about the **companion file** `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx`, not `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` itself. The incident at line 25 points to the import of `NetworkPolicyEmptyState`, and the rule says `EmptyStateHeader` must be inside `EmptyState`. Looking at the companion file, `EmptyStateHeader` IS inside `EmptyState` already. 

However, in PF v6, `EmptyStateHeader` is deprecated — its props (`headingLevel`, `titleText`) should be moved directly onto `EmptyState`. Let me apply this fix to the companion file.

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 29 - Button icon children to prop)
This targets line 29 of `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` which is `import '@styles/list-management-group.scss';`. The rule is about `Button` with icon children in `EmptyStateActions`. Looking at the companion `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx`, the `Button` at line 39 contains text children `{t('Create {{kind}}', ...)}` — no icon. There's no icon to move to an `icon` prop in this file.

### Fix 3 Analysis (Line 25 - new `titleText` prop on EmptyState)
Similar to Fix 1 — this is about the `EmptyState` usage in `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx`. The `titleText` is already being passed to `EmptyStateHeader`. In the v6 migration, it should move to `EmptyState` directly.

So Fixes 1 and 3 both point to migrating `EmptyStateHeader` props onto `EmptyState` in the companion file. Fix 2 doesn't seem applicable (no icon in Button).

Let me apply the changes to `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx`:
Now let me verify the final state of the companion file:
The companion file looks correct. Now let me verify the main file is unchanged (since fixes 1, 2, and 3 all actually targeted the companion component, not `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` itself):

The main file `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` is unchanged and correct — it doesn't directly use `EmptyState`, `EmptyStateHeader`, or `Button` with icons. All three fixes target the `NetworkPolicyEmptyState` component which lives in the companion file I already edited.

Let me verify the companion file one more time to make sure everything is clean:

The companion file is correctly updated. The main file `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` required no changes itself — it only imports `NetworkPolicyEmptyState` and doesn't directly use any of the affected PF components.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `[sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]` EmptyState family migration (EmptyStateHeader removal)
**Applied** (in companion file `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx`). The deprecated `EmptyStateHeader` component was removed. Its props (`headingLevel="h4"` and `titleText={...}`) were moved directly onto the parent `<EmptyState>` component. The `EmptyStateHeader` import was also removed. The main file `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` required no changes — it only imports the `NetworkPolicyEmptyState` component.

### Fix 2 — `[sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]` Button icon children to `icon` prop
**No change needed.** The `<Button>` in `NetworkPolicyEmptyState.tsx` contains only text children (`{t('Create {{kind}}', ...)}`), not an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. There is no icon to move to the `icon` prop. The main file `NetworkPolicyList.tsx` does not contain any `<Button>` usage.

### Fix 3 — `[sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]` EmptyState `titleText` prop
**Applied** (same change as Fix 1). The `titleText` prop was already being passed to `<EmptyStateHeader>`. By collapsing `EmptyStateHeader` into `EmptyState` (Fix 1), `titleText` is now correctly passed directly to `<EmptyState>`, which is the v6 pattern. No additional changes needed beyond what Fix 1 accomplished.
